rights.notes: Migrated from legacy published content; migration does not establish redistribution rights.

segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What did the man in this story do?

translation.text: 故事里的那个人做了什么？

segments.text: When a plane from London arrived at Sydney Airport, workers began to unload a number of wooden boxes which contained clothing.

translation.text: 一架从伦敦飞来的飞机抵达悉尼机场后，工人们开始卸下一批装有衣服的木箱。

segments.text: No one could account for the fact that one of the boxes was extremely heavy.

translation.text: 谁也解释不了为什么其中一只箱子格外沉重。

segments.text: It suddenly occurred to one of the workers to open up the box.

translation.text: 一名工人突然想到把箱子打开。

segments.text: He was astonished at what he found.

translation.text: 他看到里面的东西后大吃一惊。

segments.text: A man was lying in the box on top of a pile of woolen goods.

translation.text: 一个男人躺在一堆毛织品上面。

segments.text: He was so surprised at being discovered that he did not even try to run away.

translation.text: 他被发现后惊讶得甚至没有试图逃跑。

segments.text: After he was arrested, the man admitted hiding in the box before the plane left London.

translation.text: 被捕后，那人承认自己在飞机离开伦敦前藏进了箱子。

segments.text: He had had a long and uncomfortable trip, for he had been confined to the wooden box for over eighteen hours.

translation.text: 他的旅程漫长而不舒服，因为他被关在木箱里超过18小时。

segments.text: The man was ordered to pay three thousand five hundred pounds for the cost of the trip.

translation.text: 那人被责令支付3,500英镑的旅费。

segments.text: The normal price of a ticket is two thousand pounds.

translation.text: 普通机票的价格是2,000英镑。
